logo.description: SPACE O TECHNOLOGIES dark text logo with green 'O' circle. No background badge. Placed directly on image in bottom-right corner. Some images use a white semi-circle badge background similar to MCB style.

wide.usage: Healthcare guides, development tutorials, technical deep-dives

rightVisual.transitionStyle: soft gradient fade, no hard edge

typeA-topCompanies.headline: top-left
typeA-topCompanies.extras: company logo badges stacked vertically on right with green dotted connector lines, OR 2x3 grid below headline

typeB-guide.headline: left 30-40%
typeB-guide.visual: full-bleed photography right 60-70%, developer at workstation
typeB-guide.extras: floating UI mockup cards overlaid on photo, process flow icons in circles with arrows in lower-left

typeC-infographic.headline: centered at top
typeC-infographic.extras: location pins, connection arrows, logo bottom-right

typeD-cost.headline: left
typeD-cost.visual: person photo right with blurred background
typeD-cost.extras: floating profile cards or pricing UI elements, decorative 3D elements (coins, icons)

visualStyle.imageStyle: realistic photography with professionals in modern office/tech environments

photographyComposition.subject: professional person(s) working at computer/laptop in modern office
photographyComposition.cameraAngle: side profile or 3/4 view facing inward toward text zone
photographyComposition.environment: clean, bright, well-lit modern workspace with natural light
photographyComposition.screens: monitor(s) showing code, dashboards, or software interfaces
photographyComposition.background: softly blurred (shallow depth of field) office environment

floatingUICards.style: white cards with subtle shadow, showing app interfaces or dashboards

processFlowIcons.placement: lower-left zone, below headline (Type B layouts)
processFlowIcons.style: outlined icons inside circles (2px stroke), connected by dashed arrows, 50-60px diameter, 15-20px gap

companyLogoBadges.placement: right side stacked vertically (Type A) or 2x3 grid below headline
companyLogoBadges.style: white rounded-rectangle cards (~140x40px) with subtle border/shadow, 10-15px vertical gap

connectorLines.style: green (#A3C423) dotted/dashed lines with small dots at nodes

decorativeCircles.style: very light blue/gray (#E8EDF2), large and partially cropped

accentElements.style: 3D coins, illustrations, small isometric objects (used sparingly near headline)

circularPhotoCrop.style: person photo inside circular frame with light border, centered in canvas

visualStyle.backgroundTexture: clean white or soft light gray, very minimal, with optional subtle decorative circles
visualStyle.iconStyle: thin outlined icons in light gray/green circles with connecting dashed arrows
